payload.content: Optimizes Dockerfile instruction ordering to maximize cache reuse. Key principle: cache is invalidated at the first changed layer, so put rarely-changed layers first. For Node.js: COPY package.json first, RUN npm install, THEN COPY source. This way, source changes only invalidate the last COPY layer, not npm install. Multi-stage builds separate build environment from runtime, removing compilers and test frameworks from production images.
payload.summary: Docker build layer caching optimization reduces rebuild time from minutes to seconds by ordering Dockerfile instructions from least to most frequently changed. Docker caches each layer and invalidates all subsequent layers when a layer changes. Dependencies (package.json, go.mod) change rarely and should be copied and installed before source code. Multi-stage builds eliminate build tools from final image, reducing image size by 60-80%.
strategy: Analyze docker_build_layer_cache_optimization problem: identify root cause, measure impact, define success criteria
Implement solution using docker_build_slow, layer_cache, dockerfile patterns with production-grade error handling
Verify correctness with integration tests, benchmark performance, document edge cases and limitations
payload.code_snippet:
# Optimized Dockerfile - maximum cache reuse
FROM node:20-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
# Layer 1: deps rarely change - cached until package.json changes
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --only=production
# Layer 2: source changes frequently - only invalidates from here
COPY src/ ./src/
RUN npm run build
# Multi-stage: clean runtime image without build tools
FROM node:20-alpine AS runtime
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
COPY --from=builder /app/node_modules ./node_modules
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["node", "dist/index.js"]

bundle_gene.trigger_text: docker_build_slow,layer_cache,dockerfile,build_optimization,multi_stage,postgresql cdc sync,kubernetes hpa autoscaling,ebpf network traffic analysis,node.js event loop optimization,docker compose network isolation
